new.name: CVE-2026-25555
new.description: OpenBullet2 through version 0.3.2 contains an authentication bypass vulnerability in the API key authentication middleware that allows unauthenticated attackers to gain admin access by supplying an empty X-Api-Key header value.

update.name: cve-2015-1187-dir820l-reproduction
update.description: Independent reverse engineering and reproduction of CVE-2015-1187, an unauthenticated command injection in the D-Link DIR-820L (Rev A, v1.05B03). MIPS firmware extraction with binwalk, static analysis in Ghidra, and tracing the `ping_addr` parameter to its command-execution sink.
